formula_or_rule: For each opioid the patient takes, MME_contribution = daily_dose_mg (or mcg/hr for transdermal fentanyl) * conversion_factor. Total MME/day = sum of all contributions. CDC oral conversion factors: codeine=0.15; fentanyl transdermal (mcg/hr)=2.4; hydrocodone=1; hydromorphone=4; methadone=3 (1-20mg/day), 4 (21-40mg/day), 8 (41-60mg/day), 10 (>60mg/day) [dose-dependent, apply the factor matching the patient's total daily methadone dose]; morphine=1; oxycodone=1.5; oxymorphone=3; tapentadol=0.4; tramadol=0.1.

condition_rules.methadone: conversion factor depends on the total daily methadone dose (see tiers above)
condition_rules.multiple_opioids: if the patient is on more than one opioid, sum the MME contribution of each
